name: meditrust-pharmacy-management
description: MediTrust Pharmacy Management System with Role-Based Access Control

scripts.start: echo Please use 'npm run start:backend' and 'npm run start:frontend' in separate terminals
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: echo Starting both servers... && start cmd /k "cd backend && npm start" && start cmd /k "cd frontend && npm start"
